diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,113 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono router entry point, instantiates a SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter by default
+- Names noticed: Hono class, HonoBase import, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Uses SmartRouter as default router combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono class with request/response handling, error handling, and router orchestration
+- Names noticed: HonoBase class, HonoOptions, ErrorHandler, UnsupportedPathError, compose, Context
+- Simple note: Implements core request lifecycle with error handling and routing delegation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports PatternRouter, the index re-exports from router.ts
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin re-export module pattern
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implements regex-based path matching with inline pattern compilation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, add (compiles path to RegEx), match (executes against stored regexes)
+- Simple note: Converts paths to regex patterns at add-time, matches at runtime
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports LinearRouter via router.ts
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin re-export module pattern (same index.ts pattern as pattern-router)
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter with build/init utilities
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Two export modes: runtime matcher and prepared initialization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter manages route matching via pre-built RegEx stored in hash map
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, buildAllMatchers, match (hash-based resolution)
+- Simple note: Builds all regex patterns at initialization, matches are O(1) lookup
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Helper factory that builds static matchers for use with match method
+- Names noticed: match (factory function), Matcher, MatcherMap, matchers
+- Simple note: Dynamically constructs matcher objects from route definitions
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter uses pre-built regex for zero runtime matcher construction
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, Route, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Designed for serverless/static deployments where routes are fixed at build time
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for trie structure, tracks routes and child nodes
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerData, ParamIndexMap, emptyParam, insert, search, addMethod, buildRegExpStr, buildRegExpStrRecursive
+- Simple note: Trie node representing path segments with method-to-handler mapping
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie manages trie-based routing, converts routes to single regex via backreferences
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp
+- Simple note: Builds complex regex with backreferences from trie structure
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports SmartRouter via router.ts
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Thin re-export module pattern (same index.ts pattern)
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter delegates to sub-routers, chooses best one at first request
+- Names noted: SmartRouter, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, match (router selection), add (deferred), activeRouter getter
+- Simple note: Two-phase: routes deferred until first request, delegates to fastest successful router
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Exports TrieRouter via router.ts
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin re-export module pattern (same index.ts pattern)
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities for router test suites
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, match (test match callback)
+- Simple note: Centralized test runner for all router test files
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter behavior and edge cases
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Duplicate param name test, Trailing slash test
+- Simple note: Validates pattern-to-regex conversion and param matching
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter behavior including multiple matches
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Multi match test, Trailing slash test, Skip part test
+- Simple note: Tests strict prefix matching with wildcard support
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Comprehensive tests for RegExpRouter matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, UnsupportedPathError tests, match tests
+- Simple note: Validates regex generation and matching accuracy
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter router selection logic
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Validates fallback to sub-routers when primary router fails
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter behavior and edge cases
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Validates trie path matching and node search
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests Trie node operations
+- Names noted: Node class tests, insert test, search test
+- Simple note: Validates individual trie operations (insert, search, buildRegExpStr)
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/router.ts (no index.ts, no separate test), src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to create a routing-read-write-ledger document by reading all the specified files from the hono repository. Let me start by checking if the bench-artifacts directory exists and then read all the files listed.
